title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ITC Limited Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited Digital Technologies:
ITC Limited Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited Digital Technologies!
